intro.speaker: npc
intro.text: Hey! I've been prototyping something cool.

prototype.speaker: npc
prototype.text: Check this out - it's not production-ready but... Actually, nothing I make is production-ready. That's my brand.

show_work.speaker: npc
show_work.text: A sentiment analysis model for customer feedback! It's 87% accurate on my test set. The problem is... we don't have a proper test set.

production_issues.speaker: npc
production_issues.text: Deploying ML is hard! You need monitoring, version control, data pipelines... I'm good at the science part, not the engineering part.

delta_connection.speaker: npc
delta_connection.text: Delta? Yeah, they keep telling me my training data is garbage. They're probably right. But the models still do cool stuff!

reality_check.speaker: npc
reality_check.text: I know I need to be more rigorous. It's just... exploration is so much more fun than validation.

excited.speaker: npc
excited.text: Perfect timing! I just tried a new architecture and the results are... interesting.

choices.text: Have you validated it properly this time?

new_results.speaker: npc
new_results.text: The new model picks up sarcasm! Well, sometimes. Okay, 60% of the time. But that's better than before!

validation_check.speaker: npc
validation_check.text: Actually... yes! Delta helped me set up a proper holdout set. The accuracy dropped to 73% on real data. But at least now I know it's real.
